# Places We Eat

Food is an important part of lab culture. Recipes, restaurants, holes in the wall - you name it, we're on it. Here are some collections of places we love.

- [Ba Le](https://balebanhmi.com/) - Vietnamese bakery close to campus. A lab staple.

## Roast Beef

Over the years, the lab has made it a point of necessity to delve deeply into the world of the Massachusetts delicacy known as the North Shore Roast Beef. Whether Greek or Three Way, it's the New England answer to the post-dive Burrito of the West Coast. Here are some of our favorites:

Londi's in Peabody  
Christina's in Peabody  
Jamie's in Salem  
Pete's in Woburn  
Tostimo's in Portsmouth and Seabrook
